Details of awarding or bagging or receiving of order(s)/contract(s) [Line items]
Name of the entity to which order(s)/contract(s) is awarded
Whether the order(s)/contract(s) is ordinary course of business
Whether order(s)/contract(s) is awarded to Domestic/International entity
Whether the counterparty is indian listed entity
ISIN of the counterparty
NSE symbol of the counterparty
Scrip code of the counterparty
LEI/CIN/Registration number of the counterparty
Name of the country in which counterparty is exists
Date of award of order(s)/contract(s)
Amount of the order(s)/contract(s)
Significant terms and conditions of order(s)/contract(s) is awarded
Time period to which order(s)/contract(s) is associated
Broad commercial consideration or size of the order(s)/contract(s)
Whether the promoter/promoter group/group companies have any interest in that entity to whom the order(s)/contract(s) is awarded
Nature of interest in that entity to whom the order(s)/contract(s) is awarded
Whether the agreement would fall within related party transactions
Whether approval of Audit/Board/Shareholder Resolution is passed/proposed for approval of related party transactions
Date of Audit/Board Meeting/Shareholder Resolution for approval of related party transactions
Whether the agreement is done at arm`s length
Whether approval of Audit/Board/Shareholder Resolution is passed/proposed for approval of transaction not at arm`s length
Name of the entity awarding the order(s)/contract(s)
Whether order(s)/contract(s) is awarded by Domestic/International entity
Date of Bagging/Receiving of order(s)/contract(s)
Nature of order(s)/contract(s)
Time period by which the order(s)/contract(s) is to be executed
Broad consideration for the order(s)/contract(s)
Name of parties to the order(s)/contract(s)
Date of execution of the order(s)/contract(s)
Date of Termination/Amendment of the order(s)/contract(s)
Details of amendment or reasons for terminations and impact of the order(s)/contract(s)
